raw: {"perspective": "Security", "findings": [{"severity": "critical", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/routers/skills.py", "issue": "RLS missing on /skills/{name} endpoint — allows unauthorized skill execution", "recommended_fix": "Add RBAC check enforcing user owns skill or has execute permission, 15 minutes"}, {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "packages/swarm/autonomous_run.py", "issue": "Perspective weights are zero — learning state not persisted", "recommended_fix": "Initialize non-zero default weights and persist to encrypted store, 20 minutes"}, {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "memory/atlas/lessons.md", "issue": "Class 15 vision drift still unpatched — v0Laura misaligned", "recommended_fix": "Add pre-commit hook that validates agent delegation in every PR, 10 minutes"}, {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "docs/ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md", "issue": "Crystal Law 6 amendment incomplete — immediate contingent badges still possible", "recommended_fix": "Clarify that no mastery-task badge is shown within 5 minutes of completion, 5 minutes"}, {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/schemas/skill_execution.py", "issue": "Input validation missing — arbitrary code injection via payload", "recommended_fix": "Add Pydantic v2 strict type validation and input sanitization, 25 minutes"}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "apps/api/main.py", "issue": "Missing rate limits on public endpoints — DoS risk", "recommended_fix": "Implement FastAPI Limiter with 100 req/min per IP, 30 minutes"}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "memory/atlas/wake.md", "issue": "Wake protocol doesn't verify PERSPECTIVES non-empty — allows silent swarm collapse", "recommended_fix": "Add assertion that perspective_weights sum > 0 on launch, 10 minutes"}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "packages/swarm/__init__.py", "issue": "Swarm agents imported but never invoked — dead code", "recommended_fix": "Remove unused agent imports and add runtime check, 15 minutes"}, {"severity": "low", "file_or_area": "memory/atlas/identity.md", "issue": "Federated memory claim contradicted by empty /agents/ dir", "recommended_fix": "Update doc to reflect implementation — mark as 'planned', 10 minutes"}, {"severity": "low", "file_or_area": "memory/atlas/voice.md", "issue": "Example 3 still uses 'принято' without security validation", "recommended_fix": "Update example to show authz check before execution, 5 minutes"}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": "Session 125 replay showed 13/13 perspectives inactive — Constitution Article 3 (agent autonomy) is currently unenforced"}

findings.issue: RLS missing on /skills/{name} endpoint — allows unauthorized skill execution
findings.recommended_fix: Add RBAC check enforcing user owns skill or has execute permission, 15 minutes

findings.issue: Perspective weights are zero — learning state not persisted
findings.recommended_fix: Initialize non-zero default weights and persist to encrypted store, 20 minutes

findings.issue: Class 15 vision drift still unpatched — v0Laura misaligned
findings.recommended_fix: Add pre-commit hook that validates agent delegation in every PR, 10 minutes

findings.issue: Crystal Law 6 amendment incomplete — immediate contingent badges still possible
findings.recommended_fix: Clarify that no mastery-task badge is shown within 5 minutes of completion, 5 minutes

findings.issue: Input validation missing — arbitrary code injection via payload
findings.recommended_fix: Add Pydantic v2 strict type validation and input sanitization, 25 minutes

findings.issue: Missing rate limits on public endpoints — DoS risk
findings.recommended_fix: Implement FastAPI Limiter with 100 req/min per IP, 30 minutes

findings.issue: Wake protocol doesn't verify PERSPECTIVES non-empty — allows silent swarm collapse
findings.recommended_fix: Add assertion that perspective_weights sum > 0 on launch, 10 minutes

findings.issue: Swarm agents imported but never invoked — dead code
findings.recommended_fix: Remove unused agent imports and add runtime check, 15 minutes

findings.issue: Federated memory claim contradicted by empty /agents/ dir
findings.recommended_fix: Update doc to reflect implementation — mark as 'planned', 10 minutes

findings.issue: Example 3 still uses 'принято' without security validation
findings.recommended_fix: Update example to show authz check before execution, 5 minutes

whistleblower_flag: Session 125 replay showed 13/13 perspectives inactive — Constitution Article 3 (agent autonomy) is currently unenforced
